---
title: "Ecology"
listing:
  contents: 
    - "*.qmd"
    - "*.ipynb"
    - "!index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  categories: true
---

## Ecology

Work on dryland ecosystems, eco-hydrology, climate resilience, and the dynamics of vegetation and water.

### Topics to explore:

- Dryland vegetation patterns
- Eco-hydrological modeling
- Climate change and ecosystem resilience
- Spatial self-organization in nature
- Tree responses to drought
- Soil-water-plant dynamics
- Agroforestry systems
- Ecosystem tipping points

---

::: {#listing}
:::
